title: Ship customer success acquisition surfaces and renewal-defense content
summary: Records release evidence for the new customer-success landing page, the customer-success generic dashboard comparison page, and the renewal-defense blog that ties release history, customer usage, and weekly reviews into one account-health workflow.

Confirms the customer-success acquisition batch is represented in release evidence so announcement and changelog generation stay current.

ops.rollback_plan: Revert the customer-success landing page, customer-success comparison entry, renewal-defense blog content, and release-evidence manifest in tokvera-dashboard and tokvera if the positioning or SEO direction needs to change.
